name: Peppered Yellow Squash Hbwk07b Mm:mk
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the yellow squash lengthwise into 1/4 inch slices.
2. Dip the squash in olive oil and red wine vinegar, seasoning with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
3. Grill the seasoned squash for 5 to 7 minutes, covered, using a barbecue basket if available.
